languages.text: "Идира, поступим по-твоему, отправим экспедицию к источнику сигнала".

traits.locale_text: "Идира, поступим по-твоему, отправим экспедицию к источнику сигнала".

languages.text: "Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."
languages.original_text: "Идира, поступим по-твоему, отправим экспедицию к источнику сигнала".

traits.locale_text: "Idira, we shall do as you suggest. We shall send an expedition to the source of the signal."
"Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."
"Idira, we shall do as you suggest. We shall send an expedition to the source of the signal."
"Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."

languages.text: 「イディラ、君のやり方でやるよ」

traits.locale_text: 「イディラ、君のやり方でやるよ。」

languages.text: «Idira, seguiremos su sugerencia de enviar una expedición al origen de la señal».
languages.original_text: "Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."

traits.locale_text: «Idira, seguiremos su sugerencia de enviar una expedición al origen de la señal».

languages.text: “伊迪拉，就按你说的办，派遣考察队前往信号源头。”
languages.original_text: "Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."

traits.locale_text: “伊迪拉，就按你说的办，派遣考察队前往信号源头。”

languages.text: "Idira, wir werden Eurem Vorschlag folgen und eine Expedition zum Ursprung des Signals entsenden."
languages.original_text: "Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."

traits.locale_text: "Idira, wir werden Eurem Vorschlag folgen und eine Expedition zum Ursprung des Signals entsenden."

languages.text: "İdira, önerdiğin gibi yapacağız ve sinyalin kaynağına bir keşif seferi düzenleyeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."

traits.locale_text: "İdira, önerdiğin gibi yapacağız ve sinyalin kaynağına bir keşif seferi düzenleyeceğiz."

languages.text: « Idira, nous allons suivre vos consignes et envoyer une expédition jusqu'à la source du signal. »
languages.original_text: "Idira, we shall do as you suggest and send an expedition to the source of the signal."

traits.locale_text: « Idira, nous allons suivre vos consignes et envoyer une expédition jusqu'à la source du signal. »
